name: Cloud Storage Upload
description: Detects uploads to cloud storage services that may indicate exfiltration
query:
// Cloud Storage Exfiltration
// Large uploads to cloud storage
events from proxy
where url contains ("dropbox.com", "drive.google.com", "onedrive.live.com", "box.com", "mega.nz")
  and method = "POST"
group by username, source_ip
having sum(bytes_sent) > 50000000
within 300 seconds
